context: Tests whether the agent implements async ERP order sync correctly using BullMQ with exponential backoff retries, idempotent job enqueuing, a dead letter queue for exhausted retries, and proper ops alerting — without making synchronous ERP calls during checkout.

checklist.name: BullMQ queue usage
checklist.description: Uses BullMQ (imports Queue and/or Worker from 'bullmq') for the order sync queue rather than a simple in-process retry loop or alternative queue library

checklist.name: Async enqueue on order placed
checklist.description: Enqueues the sync job asynchronously when an order is placed, rather than calling the ERP adapter directly inline during the order placement flow

checklist.name: Idempotent job ID
checklist.description: Sets a deterministic jobId derived from the orderId (e.g., 'order-sync-{orderId}') when adding jobs to the queue

checklist.name: Retry attempts count
checklist.description: Configures queue job attempts to 5 (maxRetries: 5 or attempts: 5)

checklist.name: Backoff initial delay
checklist.description: Sets initial backoff delay to 5000ms (5 seconds)

checklist.name: Worker concurrency
checklist.description: Sets worker concurrency to 5 (processes 5 orders in parallel)

checklist.name: Dead letter queue
checklist.description: Creates a separate dead letter queue (e.g., 'order-sync-dlq') and moves jobs there after all retries are exhausted

checklist.name: Ops alert on DLQ
checklist.description: Sends an alert to an ops channel (Slack, PagerDuty, email, etc.) when a job is moved to the DLQ

checklist.name: DLQ manual retry endpoint
checklist.description: Provides an admin/API endpoint that re-enqueues a DLQ job to the main queue and removes it from the DLQ

checklist.name: ERP record ID stored on order
checklist.description: Saves the ERP-assigned order ID back onto the local order record (or sync log) after a successful sync

checklist.name: Sync log idempotency check
checklist.description: Checks the sync log or database before processing: skips the sync if the order is already marked as 'synced'
